_.discard_changes_explain: Unezinguquko ezingalondoloziwe. Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuzilahla bese uphuma kulesi sikrini?
_.storage_is_encrypted: Isitoreji sakho sibethelwe. Iphasiwedi iyadingeka ukuze sibethululwe.
_.qr_custom_input_button: Thepha izikhathi eziyi-10 ukuze ufake okufakwayo okwenziwe ngokwezifiso

azteco.errorBeforeRefeem: Ngaphambi kokusebenzisa, kufanele uqale ungeze isikhwama se-Bitcoin.
azteco.errorSomething: Kukhona okungahambanga kahle. Ingabe le vawusha isasebenza?
azteco.successMessage: Ivawusha isetshenziswe ngempumelelo! Imali yakho kufanele ifike esikhwameni sakho se-Bitcoin maduzane.
azteco.title: Sebenzisa ivawusha ye-Azte.co

lnd.refill_create: Ukuze uqhubeke, sicela udale isikhwama se-Bitcoin ozogcwalisa kabusha ngaso.
lnd.sameWalletAsInvoiceError: Awukwazi ukukhokhela i-invoyisi ngesikhwama esifanayo nesisetshenziswe ukuyidala.
lnd.title: Phatha Imali

lndViewInvoice.wasnt_paid_and_expired: Le invoyisi ayikhokhelwanga futhi isiphelelwe yisikhathi.
lndViewInvoice.refund_deferred: Imali ayikabuyiseki okwamanje. Zama futhi ngemva kokuphelelwa yisikhathi kwe-swap timelock.
lndViewInvoice.notification_claim_body: {walletLabel}: thepha ukuze uthole inkokhelo yakho engenayo ye-Lightning.
lndViewInvoice.notification_refund_body: {walletLabel}: thepha ukuze ubuyiselwe inkokhelo yakho ye-Lightning ebambekile.

plausibledeniability.create_password_explanation: Iphasiwedi yesitoreji esimbumbulu akufanele ifane neyphasiwedi yesitoreji sakho esiyinhloko.
plausibledeniability.help: Ngaphansi kwezimo ezithile, ungase uphoqeleke ukudalula iphasiwedi. Ukuze ugcine izinhlamvu zakho ziphephile, i-BlueWallet ingadala esinye isitoreji esibethelwe ngephasiwedi ehlukile. Ngaphansi kwengcindezi, ungadalula le phasiwedi komunye umuntu. Uma ifakwa ku-BlueWallet, izovula isitoreji esisha “esimbumbulu”. Lokhu kuzobonakala kungokwangempela komunye umuntu, kodwa kuzogcina ngasese isitoreji sakho esiyinhloko nezinhlamvu siphephile.
plausibledeniability.help2: Isitoreji esisha sizosebenza ngokugcwele, futhi ungagcina khona amanani amancane ukuze sibonakale sikholeka kakhudlwana.
plausibledeniability.password_should_not_match: Iphasiwedi isisetshenziswa njengamanje. Sicela uzame enye iphasiwedi.
plausibledeniability.title: Ukuphika Okunokwenzeka

pleasebackup.ask: Ingabe usuwagcinile amagama embewu yokugcina yesikhwama sakho? La magama embewu yokugcina ayadingeka ukuze ufinyelele imali yakho uma ulahlekelwa yile divayisi. Ngaphandle kwamagama embewu yokugcina, imali yakho izolahleka unomphela.
pleasebackup.text:
Sicela uthathe umzuzwana ubhale phansi la magama embewu ephepheni.
Ayimbewu yakho yokugcina futhi ungayisebenzisa ukubuyisela isikhwama.
pleasebackup.text_lnd: Sicela ugcine le mbewu yokugcina yesikhwama. Ikuvumela ukuthi ubuyisele isikhwama uma silahlekile.
pleasebackup.title: Isikhwama sakho sidaliwe.

receive.bip47_explanation: Amakhodi okukhokha angamakheli asetshenziswa yonke indawo agwema ukudalula amakheli esikhwama sakho. Akuwona wonke amasevisi azowasekela.

send.provided_address_is_invoice: Leli kheli libonakala lingelokukhokha i-invoyisi ye-Lightning. Sicela uye esikhwameni sakho se-Lightning ukuze ukhokhe le invoyisi.
send.create_this_is_hex: Lena i-hex yethransekshini yakho—esayiniwe futhi ilungele ukusakazwa kunethiwekhi.
send.details_add_recc_rem_all_alert_descripti: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa bonke abamukeli?
send.please_complete_recipient_details: Sicela uqedele imininingwane yomamukeli #{number} ngaphambi kokwengeza umamukeli omusha.
send.details_adv_full_sure: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukusebenzisa ibhalansi ephelele yesikhwama sakho kule thransekshini?
send.details_adv_full_sure_frozen: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukusebenzisa ibhalansi ephelele yesikhwama sakho kule thransekshini? Sicela uqaphele ukuthi izinhlamvu eziqandisiwe azifakiwe.
send.details_amount_field_is_less_than_minimu: Inani olifakile lincane kakhulu. Sicela ufake inani elingaphezu kuka-500 sats.
send.details_scan_hint: Thepha kabili ukuze uskene noma ungenise indawo oya kuyo
send.details_total_exceeds_balance_frozen: Inani olithumelayo lidlula ibhalansi etholakalayo. Sicela uqaphele ukuthi izinhlamvu eziqandisiwe azifakiwe.
send.details_wallet_before_tx: Ngaphambi kokudala ithransekshini, kufanele uqale ungeze isikhwama se-Bitcoin.
send.fee_replace_minvb: Izinga eliphelele lenkokhiso (i-satoshi nge-vByte) ofuna ukulikhokha kufanele libe likhulu kuna-{min} sat/vByte.
send.permission_camera_message: Sidinga imvume yakho yokusebenzisa ikhamera yakho.
send.psbt_this_is_psbt: Lena yi-Partially Signed Bitcoin Transaction (PSBT). Sicela uqedele ukuyisayina ngesikhwama sakho sehadiwe.
send.qr_error_no_qrcode: Asikwazanga ukuthola ikhodi ye-QR evumelekile esithombeni esikhethiwe. Qiniseka ukuthi isithombe siqukethe ikhodi ye-QR kuphela futhi singenakho okunye okufana nombhalo noma izinkinobho.
send.cant_send_to_silentpayment_adress: Lesi sikhwama asikwazi ukuthumela kumakheli e-SilentPayment
send.cant_send_to_bip47: Lesi sikhwama asikwazi ukuthumela kumakhodi okukhokha e-BIP47
send.cant_find_bip47_notification: Engeza le khodi yokukhokha kwabathintwayo kuqala

settings.about_free: I-BlueWallet iyiphrojekthi yamahhala nevulekile. Yenziwe abasebenzisi be-Bitcoin.
settings.block_explorer_invalid_custom_url: I-URL enikeziwe ayilungile. Sicela ufake i-URL evumelekile eqala ngo-http:// noma https://.
settings.about_selftest_electrum_disabled: Ukuzihlola akutholakali nge-Electrum Offline Mode. Sicela ukhubaze imodi yokungaxhumi bese uzama futhi.
settings.about_selftest_ok: Zonke izivivinyo zangaphakathi ziphumelele ngempumelelo. Isikhwama sisebenza kahle.
settings.privacy_temporary_screenshots_instructio: Ukuvikelwa kokuthwebula isikrini kuzovalwa okwesikhashana, kuvumele iziqephu zesikrini nokuqoshwa kwesikrini. Ukuvikelwa kuzophinda kuvuke ngokuzenzakalelayo uma uvala bese uvula kabusha i-BlueWallet.
settings.biometrics_no_longer_available: Izilungiselelo zedivayisi yakho ziguqukile futhi azisahambisani nezilungiselelo zezokuphepha ezikhethiwe kuhlelo lokusebenza. Sicela uphinde unike amandla i-biometrics noma ikhodi yokuvula, bese uqala kabusha uhlelo lokusebenza ukuze kusebenze lezi zinguquko.
settings.biom_10times: Uzame ukufaka iphasiwedi yakho izikhathi eziyi-10. Ungathanda ukusetha kabusha isitoreji sakho? Lokhu kuzosusa zonke izikhwama futhi kubethulule isitoreji sakho.
settings.biom_no_passcode: Idivayisi yakho ayinayo ikhodi yokuvula noma i-biometrics enikwe amandla. Ukuze uqhubeke, sicela ulungiselele ikhodi yokuvula noma i-biometrics kuhlelo lwezilungiselelo.
settings.biom_remove_decrypt: Zonke izikhwama zakho zizosuswa futhi isitoreji sakho sizobethululwa. Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuqhubeka?
settings.currency_fetch_error: Kube khona iphutha ngenkathi kutholwa izinga lemali ekhethiwe.
settings.electrum_error_connect_tor: Akukwazi ukuxhuma kuseva ye-Electrum enikeziwe. Sicela uqiniseke ukuthi uhlelo lwe-Orbot luxhunyiwe bese uzama futhi.
settings.electrum_offline_description: Uma kunikwe amandla, izikhwama zakho ze-Bitcoin ngeke zizame ukulanda amabhalansi noma amathransekshini.
settings.electrum_saved: Izinguquko zakho zilondolozwe ngempumelelo. Ukuqala kabusha i-BlueWallet kungase kudingeke ukuze izinguquko zisebenze.
settings.electrum_preferred_server_description: Faka iseva ofuna ukuthi isikhwama sakho siyisebenzise kuyo yonke imisebenzi ye-Bitcoin. Uma isisethiwe, isikhwama sakho sizosebenzisa le seva kuphela ukuhlola amabhalansi, ukuthumela amathransekshini, nokulanda idatha yenethiwekhi. Qiniseka ukuthi uyayethemba le seva ngaphambi kokuyisetha.
settings.electrum_reset_to_default: Lokhu kuzovumela i-BlueWallet ukuthi ikhethe iseva ngokungahleliwe ohlwini lwamaseva.
settings.electrum_reset_to_default_and_clear_hist: Setha kabusha kokuzenzakalelayo bese ususa umlando
settings.encrypt_decrypt_q: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukubethulula isitoreji sakho? Lokhu kuzovumela izikhwama zakho ukuthi zifinyelelwe ngaphandle kwephasiwedi.
settings.encrypt_storage_explanation_description_: Ukunika amandla ukubethelwa kwesitoreji kwengeza ungqimba olwengeziwe lokuvikela uhlelo lwakho lokusebenza ngokuvikela indlela idatha yakho egcinwa ngayo kudivayisi yakho. Lokhu kwenza kube nzima ukuthi noma ubani afinyelele ulwazi lwakho ngaphandle kwemvume.
Kodwa-ke, kubalulekile ukwazi ukuthi lokhu kubethela kuvikela kuphela ukufinyelela izikhwama zakho ezigcinwe ku-keychain yedivayisi. Akufaki iphasiwedi noma ukuvikela okwengeziwe ezikhwameni uqobo.
settings.set_as_preferred_electrum: Ukusetha i-{host}:{port} njengeseva encanyelwayo kuzokhubaza ukuxhuma kuseva ephakanyisiwe ngokungahleliwe.
settings.encrypted_feature_disabled: Lesi sici asikwazi ukusetshenziswa lapho isitoreji esibethelwe sinikwe amandla.
settings.encrypt_use_expl: I-{type} izosetshenziswa ukuqinisekisa ubunikazi bakho ngaphambi kokwenza ithransekshini, ukuvula, ukukhipha, noma ukususa isikhwama.
settings.biometrics_fail: Uma i-{type} ingenikwanga amandla, noma ihluleka ukuvula, ungasebenzisa ikhodi yokuvula yedivayisi yakho njengenye indlela.
settings.general_continuity_e: Uma kunikwe amandla, uzokwazi ukubuka izikhwama ezikhethiwe, namathransekshini, usebenzisa ezinye izidivayisi zakho ezixhumene ne-Apple iCloud.
settings.language_isRTL: Ukuqala kabusha i-BlueWallet kuyadingeka ukuze ukuqondiswa kolimi kusebenze.
settings.lightning_error_lndhub_uri_tor: I-URI ye-LNDhub ayilungile. Sicela uqiniseke ukuthi uhlelo lwe-Orbot luxhunyiwe bese uzama futhi.
settings.lightning_settings_explain: Ukuze uxhume kunodi yakho ye-LND, sicela ufake i-LNDhub bese ufaka i-URL yayo lapha ezilungiselelweni. Sicela uqaphele ukuthi izikhwama kuphela ezidalwe ngemva kokulondoloza izinguquko ezizoxhuma kwi-LNDhub okhonjisiwe.
settings.electrum_suggested_description: Uma iseva encanyelwayo ingasethiwe, iseva ephakanyisiwe izokhethwa ukuze isetshenziswe ngokungahleliwe.
settings.password_explain: Faka iphasiwedi ozoyisebenzisa ukuvula isitoreji sakho.
settings.privacy_quickactions_explanation: Thinta uphinde ubambe isithonjana sohlelo lwe-BlueWallet ukuze ubuke ngokushesha ibhalansi yesikhwama sakho.
settings.privacy_clipboard_explanation: Nikeza izinqamuleli uma ikheli noma i-invoyisi itholakala ebhodini lakho lokukopisha.
settings.privacy_do_not_track_explanation: Ulwazi lokusebenza nokwethembeka ngeke luthunyelwe ukuze luhlaziywe.
settings.push_notifications_explanation:
Ngokunika amandla izaziso, ithokheni yedivayisi yakho izothunyelwa kuseva, kanye namakheli ezikhwama nama-ID ethransekshini wazo zonke izikhwama namathransekshini enziwe ngemva kokunika amandla izaziso. Ithokheni yedivayisi isetshenziselwa ukuthumela izaziso, futhi ulwazi lwesikhwama lusivumela ukuthi sikwazise ngokwe-Bitcoin engenayo noma ngokuqinisekiswa kwethransekshini.

Ulwazi kuphela olusukela ngemva kokuthi unike amandla izaziso oludluliselwayo—akukho lutho olusukela ngaphambili oluqoqwayo.

Ukukhubaza izaziso kuzosusa lonke lolu lwazi kuseva. Ngaphezu kwalokho, ukususa isikhwama kuhlelo lokusebenza nakho kuzosusa ulwazi lwaso oluhlobene kuseva.
settings.total_balance_explanation: Bonisa ibhalansi ephelele yazo zonke izikhwama zakho kuma-widget esikrini sakho sasekhaya.

notifications.would_you_like_to_receive_notifications: Ungathanda ukuthola izaziso uma uthola izinkokhelo ezingenayo?
notifications.permission_denied_message: Wenqabile imvume yokukuthumelela izaziso. Uma ungathanda ukuthola izaziso, sicela uzinike amandla ezilungiselelweni zedivayisi yakho.

transactions.cancel_explain: Sizofaka esikhundleni sale thransekshini enye ekukhokhelayo enenkokhiso ephakeme. Lokhu kukhansela ngempumelelo ithransekshini yamanje. Lokhu kubizwa ngokuthi i-RBF—Replace by Fee.
transactions.transaction_loading_error: Kube khona inkinga yokulayisha ithransekshini. Sicela uzame futhi kamuva.
transactions.cpfp_exp: Sizodala enye ithransekshini esebenzisa ithransekshini yakho engaqinisekisiwe. Inkokhiso ephelele izoba ephakeme kunenkokhiso yethransekshini yokuqala, ngakho kufanele imbiwe ngokushesha. Lokhu kubizwa ngokuthi i-CPFP—Child Pays for Parent.
transactions.cpfp_no_bump: Le thransekshini inkokhiso yayo ayikwazi ukukhushulwa.
transactions.enable_offline_signing: Lesi sikhwama asisetshenziswa kanye nokusayina okungaxhumi. Ungathanda ukukunika amandla manje?
transactions.open_url_error: Akukwazi ukuvula isixhumanisi ngesiphequluli esizenzakalelayo. Sicela ushintshe isiphequluli sakho esizenzakalelayo bese uzama futhi.
transactions.rbf_explain: Sizofaka esikhundleni sale thransekshini enye enenkokhiso ephakeme ukuze imbiwe ngokushesha. Lokhu kubizwa ngokuthi i-RBF—Replace by Fee.
transactions.watchOnlyWarningDescription: Qaphela abakhwabanisi abavame ukusebenzisa izikhwama “zokubuka-kuphela” ukukhohlisa abasebenzisi. Lezi zikhwama azikuvumeli ukuthi ulawule noma uthumele imali; zikuvumela kuphela ukubuka ibhalansi.
transactions.custom_fee_warning_description: Izinkokhiso ezingaphansi kuka-1 sat/vB zivumelekile, kodwa zingase zingadluliselwa ngenxa yezinqubomgomo zenodi.

wallets.add_entropy_reset_message: Ukushintsha uhlobo lwesikhwama kuzosetha kabusha i-entropy yamanje. Uyafuna ukuqhubeka?
wallets.add_entropy_remain: {gen} amabhayithi e-entropy ekhiqiziwe. Amabhayithi asele angu-{rem} azotholwa kusenza-zinombolo-ezingahleliwe sesistimu.
wallets.add_lndhub_error: Ikheli lenodi elinikeziwe liyinodi ye-LNDhub engalungile.
wallets.clipboard_bitcoin: Unekheli le-Bitcoin ebhodini lakho lokukopisha. Ungathanda ukulisebenzisela ithransekshini?
wallets.clipboard_lightning: Une-invoyisi ye-Lightning ebhodini lakho lokukopisha. Ungathanda ukuyisebenzisela ithransekshini?
wallets.details_del_wb_err: Inani lebhalansi elinikeziwe alihambisani nebhalansi yalesi sikhwama. Sicela uzame futhi.
wallets.details_del_wb_q: Lesi sikhwama sinebhalansi. Ngaphambi kokuqhubeka, sicela uqaphele ukuthi ngeke ukwazi ukubuyisa imali ngaphandle kwamagama embewu yalesi sikhwama. Ukuze ugweme ukususa ngephutha, sicela ufake ibhalansi yesikhwama sakho engu-{balance} amasatoshi.
wallets.import_passphrase_message: Faka ibinzana lokungena uma usebenzise eyodwa
wallets.import_error: Kuhlulekile ukungenisa. Sicela uqiniseke ukuthi idatha enikeziwe ilungile.
wallets.import_explanation: Sicela ufake amagama akho embewu, isihluthulelo somphakathi, i-WIF, noma noma yini onayo. I-BlueWallet izozama ngamandla ayo wonke ukuqagela ifomethi efanele bese ingenisa isikhwama sakho.
wallets.import_success_watchonly: Isikhwama sakho singeniswe ngempumelelo. ISEXWAYISO: Lesi yisikhwama sokubuka-kuphela, ngeke UKWAZI ukukhokha ngaso.
wallets.import_discovery_offline: I-BlueWallet okwamanje isemodini yokungaxhumi. Kule modi, ayikwazi ukuqinisekisa ubukhona besikhwama, ngakho kuzodingeka ukhethe esifanele mathupha
wallets.import_derivation_subtitle: Faka indlela yokususelwa yezifiso, sizozama ukuthola isikhwama sakho.
wallets.list_create_a_wallet_text:
Kumahhala, futhi ungadala 
noma zingaki ozifunayo.
wallets.list_empty_txs1_lightning: Isikhwama se-Lightning kufanele sisetshenziselwe amathransekshini akho ansuku zonke. Izinkokhiso zishibhile ngokumangalisayo futhi isivinini siyashesha kakhulu.
wallets.list_empty_txs2_lightning: Ukuze uqale ukusisebenzisa, thepha ku-Phatha Imali bese ugcwalisa ibhalansi yakho.
wallets.no_ln_wallet_error: Ngaphambi kokukhokhela i-invoyisi ye-Lightning, kufanele uqale ungeze isikhwama se-Lightning.
wallets.looks_like_bip38: Lokhu kubukeka kuyisihluthulelo esiyimfihlo esivikelwe ngephasiwedi (BIP38).
wallets.select_no_bitcoin_exp: Isikhwama se-Bitcoin siyadingeka ukuze ugcwalise izikhwama ze-Lightning. Sicela udale noma ungenise esisodwa.
wallets.scan_import: Skena le khodi ye-QR ukuze ungenise isikhwama sakho kwenye i-aplikheshini.
wallets.write_down: Bhala phansi bese ugcina ngokuphephile la magama. Wasebenzise ukubuyisela isikhwama sakho kamuva.
wallets.copy_ln_url: Kopisha bese ugcina ngokuphephile le URL ukuze ubuyisele isikhwama sakho kamuva.
wallets.copy_ln_public: Kopisha bese ugcina ngokuphephile lolu lwazi ukuze ubuyisele isikhwama sakho kamuva.
wallets.details_delete_wallet_error_message: Kube khona inkinga ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi lesi sikhwama sisusiwe ezazisweni—lokhu kungase kubangelwe inkinga yenethiwekhi noma uxhumano oluthe xaxa. Uma uqhubeka, ungase usaqhubeke uthole izaziso zamathransekshini ahlobene nalesi sikhwama, ngisho nangemva kokuba sisusiwe.

total_balance_view.title: Ibhalansi Ephelele
total_balance_view.explanation: Buka ibhalansi ephelele yazo zonke izikhwama zakho kusikrini esibukela konke.

multisig.provide_signature_details: Sebenzisa idivayisi yakho nesikhwama lapho isihluthulelo sihlala khona ukuze usayine le thransekshini
multisig.provide_signature_details_bluewallet: Ku-BlueWallet, iya kwimenyu yesikrini sokuThumela bese ukhetha
multisig.provide_signature_next_steps_details: Uma isikhwama sakho sesisayine ithransekshini ngempumelelo, skena ikhodi ye-QR enikeziwe noma ungenise ifayela elihambisanayo, bese ubuyekeza yonke imininingwane yethransekshini ngaphambi kokuyisakaza.
multisig.shared_key_detected_question: Kunosayina naye owabelwene nawe, uyafuna ukumngenisa?
multisig.what_is_vault_description_to_spend:
ukuze ukhokhe kanye nesesithathu 
ongasisebenzisa njengesipele.
multisig.not_a_multisignature_xpub: Lena akusiyo i-XPUB esuka esikhwameni se-multisignature!
multisig.invalid_cosigner_format: Osayina naye ongalungile: Lona akasiye osayina naye wefomethi ye-{format}.
multisig.type_your_mnemonics: Faka imbewu ukuze ungenise isihluthulelo sesefe yakho esikhona.
multisig.this_is_cosigners_xpub: Lena yi-XPUB yosayina naye—ilungele ukungeniswa kwenye isikhwama. Kuphephile ukwabelana ngayo.
multisig.this_is_cosigners_xpub_airdrop: Uma wabelana nge-AirDrop abamukeli kufanele babe kusikrini sokuxhumanisa.
multisig.wallet_key_created: Isihluthulelo sakho sesefe sidaliwe. Thatha umzuzwana ukuze wenze isipele esiphephile sembewu yakho.
multisig.are_you_sure_seed_will_be_lost: Uqinisekile? Imbewu yakho izolahleka uma ungenaso isipele.
multisig.forget_this_seed: Khohlwa le mbewu bese usebenzisa i-XPUB esikhundleni sayo.
multisig.ms_help_title: Indlela Amasefe e-Multisig Asebenza Ngayo: Amathiphu Namaqhinga
multisig.ms_help_text: Isikhwama esinezihluthulelo eziningi, ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukuphepha noma ukugcina okwabiwe
multisig.ms_help_1: Isefe izosebenza nezinye izinhlelo zokusebenza ze-BlueWallet kanye nezikhwama ezihambisana ne-PSBT, ezifana ne-Electrum, Specter, Coldcard, Cobo Vault, njll.
multisig.ms_help_2: Ungadala zonke izihluthulelo zesefe kule divayisi bese uzisusa noma uzihlela kamuva. Ukuba nazo zonke izihluthulelo kudivayisi efanayo kunokuphepha okulingana nesikhwama se-Bitcoin esivamile.
multisig.ms_help_3: Ezinkethweni zesikhwama, uzothola isipele sesefe yakho nesipele sokubuka-kuphela. Lesi sipele sifana nebalazwe lesikhwama sakho. Sibalulekile ekubuyiseni isikhwama uma ulahlekelwa enye yezimbewu zakho.
multisig.ms_help_4: Ukuze ungenise i-multisig, sebenzisa ifayela lakho lesipele kanye nesici sokuNgenisa. Uma unezimbewu nama-XPUB kuphela, ungasebenzisa inkinobho yokuNgenisa yedwa lapho udala izihluthulelo zesefe.
multisig.ms_help_5: Ngokuzenzakalelayo, i-BlueWallet izokhiqiza isefe engu-2-kuya-ku-3. Ukuze udale ikhoramu ehlukile noma ushintshe uhlobo lwekheli, vula i-Modi Ethuthukisiwe Kuzilungiselelo.

is_it_my_address.title: Ingabe likheli lami?
is_it_my_address.no_wallet_owns_address: Asikho isikhwama esitholakalayo esingumnikazi wekheli elinikeziwe.

autofill_word.title: Igama lokugcina lembewu
autofill_word.error: Okufakiwe akuwona amagama embewu angaphelele ayi-11 noma angu-23. Sicela uzame futhi.

cc.tip: Lesi sici sikuvumela ukubona, ukufaka ilebula, ukuqandisa noma ukukhetha izinhlamvu ukuze uphathe isikhwama kangcono. Ungakhetha izinhlamvu eziningi ngokuthepha izindingilizi ezinombala.

addresses.sensitive_private_key: Isexwayiso: izihluthulelo eziyimfihlo zibucayi kakhulu. Qhubeka?
addresses.sign_help: Lapha ungadala noma uqinisekise isiginesha se-cryptographic esisekelwe kwikheli le-Bitcoin.

lnurl_auth.link_answer: Isikhwama sakho se-Lightning sixhunywe ngempumelelo ku-akhawunti yakho ku-{hostname}!

bip47.notif_tx_sent: Ithransekshini yesaziso ithunyelwe. Sicela ulinde ukuthi iqinisekiswe
